query: I'm starting a new research project on post-quantum cryptography migration strategies. Set it up.
expected_behavior: Uses python3 tools/wiki.py project new <slug> to scaffold the project rather than hand-creating project.md/CLAUDE.md/TODO.md/AGENDA.md/queries/
Picks a reasonable slug and doesn't ask the user to specify low-level scaffold mechanics
Notes that project.md's wiki_refs/tags are load-bearing and should be populated (or linked via project link) once relevant wiki pages are identified
Does not create an AGENDA.md-driven nightly automation without the user opting in — correctly notes AGENDA.md is scaffolded dormant (enabled: false) by default
